prestazioni: N55B30M0 (3.0L twin-scroll turbo inline-6) upgraded with a Pure Stage 2 turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, custom 4-inch V-band downpipe, and CSF intercooler with 5.5-inch end tanks for reduced intake temps and 30% increased airflow capacity

MCS 2-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom valving for F10 chassis, and 8-position rebound damping, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars for reduced body roll and optimized weight transfer

Full fuel system overhaul with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -8AN lines to handle E85 blends up to 50% for sustained 550whp on 93 octane
estetica: 3D Design F10 M Performance-style front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter and custom AG Motorsport carbon fiber side skirts, matched with a Vorsteiner GTS5 rear diffuser and GT3-style rear bumper for aggressive aero balance

OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber kidney grilles with gloss black surround, paired with LCI-style LED headlights retrofitted with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs and custom Angel Eyes with RGBW LED halos controlled via Coding via BimmerTech

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (F10-specific) with 20mm extended fenders, custom 9.5J ET22 front and 10.5J ET30 rear BBS LM-R wheels in 20x9.5 and 20x10.5 sizes, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/20 front, 285/30/20 rear)
